Description: The SS8050-G is an NPN bipolar junction transistor in a SOT-23 surface-mount package, designed for general-purpose amplification and switching applications. It functions as a current-controlled device where a small base current controls a larger collector current, enabling signal amplification, driving loads, or acting as an electronic switch. It features a high DC current gain and a transition frequency suitable for low to medium frequency circuits.

Functions.FunctionDescription: Controls the flow of current between the collector and emitter.
The terminal from which the majority of current flows out; typically connected to ground or a lower potential.
The terminal that receives power and outputs the amplified/switched current.
